$schema: User-defined Google Calendar color → life area mapping. ICS exports often omit colors; used for onboarding swatches and Google sync (v1.1).

tangerine.label: Tangerine / Orange
tangerine.userNote: Job-hunting & personal brand (personal + sometimes work calendar)

basil.label: Basil (dark green)
basil.userNote: Lunch, dinner, supermarket, cooking — eating well & sustainable rhythms

banana.label: Banana (yellow)
banana.userNote: Always Lua (dog) — any calendar. Special outings: keywords beach, park, etc.

sage.label: Sage (light green)
sage.userNote: Exercise — yoga at home, gym; target 5h/week

keywordOverrides.note: Special activities with Lua beyond neighbourhood walks

exceptions.note: Yellow is always pet care — booked wherever Lua needs care
